examples: It was a great night and I had a massive hangover.
It is thought attendance figures in the US and Canada will rise next year, when sequels to the hit comedies The Hangover and Pirates of the Caribbean are released.
She woke up with a terrible hangover.
The scene is young, loud and bound to engender at least a mild hangover.
Teachers also warn the hangover from these legislative changes will have consequences in the fall.
